response.step_by_step_log: The entire video was reviewed for vocal music. The audio consists entirely of VTuber commentary, Minecraft gameplay sound effects, and ambient sounds. No vocal music was detected in any segment of the video. Therefore, all song metadata fields are set to null and contains_vocal_music is set to false.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a VTuber playing Minecraft, interacting with in-game trading, and subsequently muting the microphone to eat while continuing to play. There is no vocal music in the video.

scenes.description: The VTuber is playing Minecraft, interacting with the game's economy and trading UI. The audio consists of their commentary and game sound effects.
The VTuber mutes their microphone to eat, with a visual graphic 'INA IS EATING.. MIC MUTED!' displayed on screen. Only Minecraft game sound effects and ambient noise are audible.
